name: true-video-product-gallery
description: Build tools for True Video Product Gallery assets

scripts.build:js: npx -y terser assets/js/tvpg-frontend.js -o assets/js/tvpg-frontend.min.js --compress --mangle && npx -y terser assets/js/tvpg-admin-product.js -o assets/js/tvpg-admin-product.min.js --compress --mangle && npx -y terser assets/js/tvpg-admin-settings.js -o assets/js/tvpg-admin-settings.min.js --compress --mangle && npx -y terser assets/js/tvpg-block-editor.js -o assets/js/tvpg-block-editor.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.build:css: npx -y clean-css-cli assets/css/tvpg-frontend.css -o assets/css/tvpg-frontend.min.css && npx -y clean-css-cli assets/css/tvpg-admin.css -o assets/css/tvpg-admin.min.css
scripts.build: npm run build:swiper && npm run build:js && npm run build:css
